source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Suppose the moving rod in figure is \( 0.10 \\ \mathrm{m} \) long, the velocity \( v \) is \( 2.5 \\ \mathrm{m/s} \), the total resistance of the loop is \( 0.030 \\ \Omega \), and \( B \) is \( 0.60 \\ \mathrm{T} \). Find the force acting on the rod.
